pages.title: Voice Agent Design Questions
pages.kicker: Choose the control boundary before choosing the model

cards.title: What must be exact?
cards.body: Keep ASR visible for transcripts, timestamps, search, confidence, and audit.

cards.title: What must be heard?
cards.body: Use audio models for prosody, overlap, sound events, speaker cues, and uncertainty.

cards.title: When must it speak?
cards.body: Measure turn timing, interruption recovery, first audio, and live translation jitter.

cards.title: What can it do?
cards.body: Put permissions, confirmations, schema checks, and logs between intent and action.
